products.productDescription: Africola is a multiple award winning South Australian restaurant, housed in a colourful, heritage-listed East End building - the home of good times in Adelaide. The restaurant is centred around an open-plan kitchen and wood-fire oven – with big flavours, smoke, and spice at the heart of everything they do.

Occupying a prime position in the Adelaide Central Market, Lucia's has been providing locals and out-of-towners with authentic Southern Italian cuisine for decades. Established in 1957, the first pizza bar in Adelaide.
products.address: Adelaide Central Market, Shop 1-2 Central Western Mall, Adelaide SA 5000

note: ATDW products found for lunch review venues. Most small local restaurants are not listed in the tourism database.
